currentFocus: v1.0.8 release-prep is locally validated and ready for prep-only commit/push. Scope is bounded metadata, release-candidate ZIP naming, release-readiness reporting, package validation, and the Media smoke harness repair; it does not authorize release publication, tag creation, upload, signing, installer/MSIX/Store work, gameplay proof, or capability promotion.

currentTruth.wave1220StaticCloseout: Wave1220 static closeout acceptance: active current-risk focused accounting is `1179/1179 = 100.00%`; remaining active focused work: 0

preSolUltraQualityWave.summary: The current wave is fixing small, reviewable correctness and hygiene gaps found by local workers and bounded root review. It is not a runtime-proof, release-publication, live-Ghidra, or game-mutation lane.
implementedRepairs: Save analyzer now rejects same-size .bes buffers when the version word is wrong and covers the regression in AppCore tests.
Lore index and internal-target fallback now reject links that resolve outside the lore root and cover above-root file-backed cases.
ZIP package extraction rejects absolute, drive-qualified, empty, dot, dot-dot, and outside-root members before extraction.
Lore pack redaction consumes full maintainer-local path families before broad drive-root replacement.
Static-to-proof and Wave1220 probes are more tolerant of current canonical forms while retaining fail-closed checks.
Ghidra static queue probe no longer writes queue artifacts during read-only --check runs; writing now requires --write-report.
WinUI agentic UI hardening metrics script was added as advisory local tooling.
Repo text hygiene now flags private repo-root path families in directive and subagent text surfaces.
package.json includes the local docsync check wrapper.

v108ReleasePrep.summary: Current prep bumps package metadata and the release-candidate ZIP filename to v1.0.8, adds candidate-only readiness accounting, repairs the representative Media UIA smoke locator/selection path, and keeps v1.0.7 as the last public GitHub Release until explicit publication authority is granted. The final v1.0.8 ZIP candidate passes under the final name.
v108ReleasePrep.finalGateStatus: pass; extracted launch, Home navigation, Lore reader, representative Media smoke, root layout, payload safety, Lore pack checks, and process cleanup passed
v108ReleasePrep.mediaSmokeRepair: WinUiMediaInteractionSmokeTests now scopes media row lookup to MediaAudioTreeView/MediaVideoTreeView TreeItems, uses UIA scroll/selection/invoke/click activation, and waits for exact selected text before asserting.
nonClaims: No GitHub Release, tag, release asset upload, signing, installer, MSIX, Store package, or announcement.

No hard payload, copied executable, raw proof bundle, full Ghidra database, secret, installed-game mutation, original BEA.exe mutation, Host/Join enablement, online-ready claim, gameplay claim, rebuild claim, or visual parity claim.

currentTruth.hardPayloadBoundary: No hard payloads, secrets, raw local campaign paths, storage manifests, private proof paths, copied executables, screenshots/frame dumps, full Ghidra databases, .env files, build output, package output, or local runtime caches belong in tracked docs/state.
nonClaims: No installed Battle Engine Aquila folder or original BEA.exe mutation.
No BEA executable/CDB/gameplay launch, visual proof, gameplay proof, or runtime causality proof. The v1.0.8 package evidence is limited to WinUI UIA launch/Home/Lore/representative Media smokes.
No live Ghidra mutation, decompiler read-back, private asset access, extractor/importer execution, or generated asset output.
No Host/Join enablement, online/player-ready promotion, release publication, tag, upload, installer, MSIX, Store work, or announcement.

validation.knownLocalOnlyGateBehavior: tools/ghidra_static_reaudit_queue_probe.py --check is expected to fail closed when no local quality snapshot exists; it no longer writes queue output unless --write-report is passed.
remainingGatePlan: Complete fresh read-only acceptance review of the v1.0.8 prep patch.
Commit and push prep only after acceptance review is read.
Keep publication, tag creation, release asset upload, signing, installer/MSIX/Store work, and announcement blocked until separate explicit authorization.

nextSteps: Run fresh read-only acceptance over the v1.0.8 prep patch.
If acceptance passes, commit and push prep only, then verify HEAD, origin/main, and live remote refs match.
Publish v1.0.8 only in a later explicitly authorized release slice.
